strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, directly matching a key requirement
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and depth
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright — core required technologies not clearly validated
No clear evidence of Kotlin or Java usage in recent roles despite being a secondary stack requirement
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a track record of building scalable, test-driven systems — all highly aligned with the role. However, gaps in confirmed usage of required tools (Nest.js, Vitest) and secondary languages (Kotlin/Java) raise moderate risk, though his adaptability and open-source initiative suggest he can bridge these quickly.
